name: Evenki

ancestors.notes: Descent per Glottolog classification of Evenki (even1259).

notes: Skeleton. Evenki is a Northern Tungusic language written in a Cyrillic alphabet that extends Russian with a single extra letter, Ӈ (velar nasal). The base Cyrillic letters are mapped with their usual values (в rendered as the approximant w, as in Evenki); iotated Е Ё Ю Я get their glide+vowel reading. Evenki has phonemic vowel length and pervasive vowel harmony that the practical orthography does not consistently mark; length and harmony are therefore left unencoded, raising the PER floor.

sources.author: Hammarström, H. et al. (Glottolog 5.0)
sources.title: Glottolog: Evenki (even1259)
sources.publisher: Max Planck Institute for Evolutionary Anthropology
